title: Check if a Parentheses String Can Be Valid
titleCn: 判断一个括号字符串是否有效

testcases.input: s = "))()))", locked = "010100" Output: true Explanation: locked[1] == '1' and locked[3] == '1', so we cannot change s[1] or s[3]. We change s[0] and s[4] to '(' while leaving s[2] and s[5] unchanged to make s valid.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: locked[1] == '1' and locked[3] == '1', so we cannot change s[1] or s[3]. We change s[0] and s[4] to '(' while leaving s[2] and s[5] unchanged to make s valid.

testcases.input: s = "()()", locked = "0000" Output: true Explanation: We do not need to make any changes because s is already valid.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: We do not need to make any changes because s is already valid.

testcases.input: s = ")", locked = "0" Output: false Explanation: locked permits us to change s[0]. Changing s[0] to either '(' or ')' will not make s valid.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: locked permits us to change s[0]. Changing s[0] to either '(' or ')' will not make s valid.

testcases.input: s = "(((())(((())", locked = "111111010111" Output: true Explanation: locked permits us to change s[6] and s[8]. We change s[6] and s[8] to ')' to make s valid.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: locked permits us to change s[6] and s[8]. We change s[6] and s[8] to ')' to make s valid.
